title: Chinese Basil Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Chinese-inspired dish featuring chicken, basil, and a sweet and sour sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the robustly flavored soy sauce, chinese rice vinegar, and sweet and sour sauce to the skillet.
Stir to combine and bring the sauce to a simmer.
Add the cooked chicken back into the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped fresh basil leaves and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until wilted.
Serve hot over rice or noodles and top with a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
